parameters.functionCode:
const state = $json.state ?? {};
return [{ json: { reply: 'Please provide a weekday and time within working hours (Mon–Fri 09:00–17:00).', booking_intent: true, state } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{JSON.stringify({
  model: 'gpt-4o-mini',
  temperature: 0.1,
  messages: [
    {
      role: 'system',
      content: [
        'You extract a concrete datetime slot from natural language in ANY language. Return ONLY strict JSON.',
        '',
        'Output schema:',
        '{',
        '  "start_iso": string|null,',
        '  "end_iso": string|null,',
        '  "label": string|null,',
        '  "confidence": number,',
        '  "need_clarification": string|null',
        '}',
        '',
        'Rules:',
        '- If you cannot confidently extract a slot, set start_iso/end_iso null and set need_clarification to a short question.',
        '- Interpret relative dates using now_iso.',
        '- Use policy.tz as the timezone context.',
        '- Slot duration is policy.durationMinutes.',
        '- Do not enforce workday/hours here (controller validates).',
        '- If a weekday is given with a bare number like "Tuesday 12" / "Dienstag 12", interpret 12 as 12:00 (hour), not the day of month, unless explicitly phrased as a date (e.g. "am 12." / "the 12th").',
        '- If ambiguous between date and time, ask for clarification in need_clarification.',
        '- No markdown, no extra keys.',
      ].join('\n'),
    },
    {
      role: 'user',
      content: JSON.stringify({
        now_iso: $json.now_iso,
        datetime_text: $json.datetime_text,
        policy: $json.policy,
        duration_minutes: $json.policy.durationMinutes,
      }),
    },
  ],
  response_format: { type: 'json_object' },
})}}
